ddls:
CREATE TABLE "browser_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for detailed analysis */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the browser */,
  "visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits */,
  "pages_per_visit" REAL /* Average number of pages visited per visit */,
  "avg_time_on_site" TEXT /* Average time spent on the site */,
  "new_visits_pct" REAL /* Percentage of new visits */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the browser */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views for the visit */,
  "time_on_site" TEXT /* Total time spent on the site for the visit */,
  "entrance_page" TEXT /* The first page the user landed on */,
  "exit_page" TEXT /* The last page the user visited before leaving the site */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* The source from which the user was referred to the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_metrics_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the browser's entry */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system the browser is used on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric entry */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who visited */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "entry_page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entry page */,
  "exit_page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exit page */,
  "referral_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referral source */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device type */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_exit_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("exit_page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES browser_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_entry_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., new, returning) */,
  "first_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's first visit */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user (if available) */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last visit */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits by the user */,
  "total_time_spent" TEXT /* Total time spent on the site by the user */,
  "conversion_count" INTEGER /* Number of conversions by the user */,
  "last_conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page visit */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page visited */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "time_spent_on_page" TEXT /* Time spent by the user on the page */,
  "page_load_time" TEXT /* Time taken to load the page */,
  "exit_rate" REAL /* Exit rate of the page */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the page */,
  "incoming_links" INTEGER /* Number of incoming links to the page */,
  "outgoing_links" INTEGER /* Number of outgoing links from the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bounce_rates" (
  "bounce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bounce rate entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the page visit */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the page */,
  "entry_page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entry page */,
  "exit_page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exit page */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device type */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "referral_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referral source */,
  "time_on_page" TEXT /* Time spent on the page before bouncing */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bounce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounce_rates_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounce_rates_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounce_rates_entry_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounce_rates_exit_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("exit_page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)
